content.question: Would repurposing school infrastructure (crèches, community services) toward social provision reduce the perceived social-capital loss documented in Polish villages where schools closed, or would it generate legitimacy conflict over institutional conversion similar to church takeover contestation?
content.reduction_path: Pilot repurposing programme in 3–5 small settlements with baseline and two-year social-capital measurement (bridging ties, cognitive trust, service accessibility); compare perceived legitimacy of repurposing vs. closure vs. church takeover via structured community deliberation
